Node.js vendor copy

This folder contains the official Windows x64 Node.js v24.14.1 runtime.

The desktop app uses this runtime to run the bundled Next.js standalone server with the same Node ABI used during local verification.

Project: https://nodejs.org/
Release: https://github.com/nodejs/node/releases/tag/v24.14.1
node.exe SHA-256: 58E74BF02FC5BBACC41DCB8BEF089961CD5BDDD37830B87784E4FC624D145D1F
License and bundled third-party notices: LICENSE

Keep NOTICE.txt and LICENSE beside node.exe when redistributing the desktop app.
